queries.question: List both horror and thriller films where either have a $20M budget.
queries.sql:
SELECT Movies.Title 
FROM Movies
WHERE (Movies.Genre = "Horror" OR Movies.Genre = "Thriller") AND Movies.Budget = "20 million USD"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?movies a :Movies .
  ?movies p:Title ?title .
  ?movies p:Genre ?genre_w .
  ?movies p:Genre ?genre_w2 .
  ?movies p:Budget ?budget_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?genre_w) = "Horror" || STR(?genre_w2) = "Thriller")) && STR(?budget_w) = "20 million USD"))
}

queries.question: Please list horrors and thrillers with a $20M budget.
queries.sql:
SELECT Movies.Title 
FROM Movies
WHERE Movies.Genre = "Horror" OR Movies.Genre = "Thriller" AND Movies.Budget = "20 million USD"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?movies a :Movies .
  ?movies p:Title ?title .
  ?movies p:Genre ?genre_w .
  ?movies p:Genre ?genre_w2 .
  ?movies p:Budget ?budget_w .
  FILTER((STR(?genre_w) = "Horror" || (STR(?genre_w2) = "Thriller" && STR(?budget_w) = "20 million USD")))
}
